/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC   -shared -Wl,-soname,libcollision_map_creator_msgs.so -o /home/ubuntu/robotics_udacity/p3/catkin_ws/devel/lib/libcollision_map_creator_msgs.so CMakeFiles/collision_map_creator_msgs.dir/collision_map_request.pb.cc.o CMakeFiles/collision_map_creator_msgs.dir/vector2d.pb.cc.o CMakeFiles/collision_map_creator_msgs.dir/header.pb.cc.o CMakeFiles/collision_map_creator_msgs.dir/time.pb.cc.o   -L/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/pkgconfig/../../../lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/gazebo-11/plugins  -L/home/ubuntu/robotics_udacity/p3/catkin_ws/build/pgm_map_creator/msgs  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/pkgconfig/../../../lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/gazebo-11/plugins:/home/ubuntu/robotics_udacity/p3/catkin_ws/build/pgm_map_creator/msgs -lprotobuf
